page: Amazon Web Services m8ine.4xlarge is a general-purpose instance powered by the AWS Nitro hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with a dedicated Intel processor running at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz. The hardware configuration delivers 16 virtual CPUs mapped to 8 physical cores, utilizing 2 threads per core.

The instance is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB per virtual core. It does not include any local NVMe or SSD storage, meaning all storage operations rely entirely on external Elastic Block Store (EBS) volumes. Additionally, this instance does not feature any GPU acceleration, making it unsuitable for workloads requiring hardware-accelerated graphics or parallel computing.

Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 25 Gbps, optimized for network and EBS throughput. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the m8ine.4xlarge offers a balanced resource density for general-purpose computing without the added cost of local storage or specialized accelerators. This makes it a predictable option for standard enterprise workloads, web serving, and application servers that do not require high-performance local disk I/O.
description: Amazon Web Services m8ine.4xlarge is a general-purpose instance built on the AWS Nitro hypervisor. It features an x86_64 Intel processor operating at 3.9 GHz, providing 16 dedicated virtual CPUs across 8 physical cores with hyper-threading. The instance is configured with 64.0 GB of system memory, maintaining a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio of 4.0 GB per core. It lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, relying entirely on network-attached storage. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 25 Gbps, which is optimized for EBS connectivity. This resource profile makes the instance highly suitable for standard enterprise applications, web servers, and mid-tier database workloads that require consistent CPU performance and moderate memory capacity without the need for local high-speed disk storage.
og_description: Amazon Web Services m8ine.4xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 16 vCPUs, 64 GB of RAM, a 3.9 GHz Intel processor, and 25 Gbps network bandwidth, with no local storage or GPU.
meta_description: Amazon Web Services m8ine.4xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 16 vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, and a 3.9 GHz Intel CPU on the Nitro hypervisor.
tagline: A balanced general-purpose instance featuring dedicated Intel processors, 64 GB of memory, and 25 Gbps network bandwidth for standard workloads.
bullet_points: Dedicated Intel processor running at 3.9 GHz with 16 vCPUs and 8 physical cores
64.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 4.0 GB per vCPU ratio
Baseline network bandwidth of 25 Gbps optimized for EBS and network traffic
No local storage or GPU accelerators included, relying on network-attached storage
Suited for general-purpose workloads, application servers, and web serving
